process.title: How we work
process.subtitle: A simple, transparent process from first message to finished ceiling

steps.d: Send us a message or call — we reply the same day.
We discuss your wishes and show samples and materials.
We visit, measure and prepare a precise quote.
Quick, clean work at the time we agreed.
Handover, walkthrough and warranty — you enjoy the home.

items.q: How much does a new ceiling cost?
items.a: Prices start at 25 €/m². The exact cost depends on type, area and lighting. Use the calculator for an estimate.
Most apartments are done in 1–3 days. Larger projects are scheduled in advance.
Only certified PVC and fabric materials from European manufacturers (Germany, France).
Up to 12 years on the material and 5 years on the installation.
No. A damp cloth a couple of times a year is enough.
Yes — we design and install LED lights, spots and decorative lighting.
Stretch ceilings are installed without noise or dust. No need to move furniture.
Yes — curved shapes, photo print, multi-level designs. Tell us your idea.

sections.p: This privacy policy describes how Kodu ja Lagi collects, uses and protects your personal data when you use our website and services. We process data in line with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

We collect data you voluntarily share with us: name, phone, email, message and information about the service requested. We also collect technical data (IP address, browser, pages visited) for analytics and security.
We use your data to reply to inquiries, prepare quotes, deliver services and meet legal obligations. We never sell or share your data with third parties for marketing.
We keep personal data only as long as needed to provide the service or meet legal obligations. Afterwards data is securely deleted.
You have the right to access, correct, delete or restrict the processing of your data, and to withdraw consent. To exercise these rights, contact us at info@kodujalagi.ee.
Cookies are small text files saved on your device by a website so that the site works better and remembers your preferences.

Essential cookies: required for the site to work (e.g. selected language).
Analytics cookies: help us understand how visitors use the site.
Functional cookies: remember your choices (e.g. calculator inputs).
You can disable or delete cookies in your browser settings. Note that disabling essential cookies may affect how the site works.
We may use services such as Google Analytics that set their own cookies. Their own privacy policies apply.
These terms govern your use of the Kodu ja Lagi website and services. By using the site, you agree to them.

We design and install stretch, suspended and acoustic ceilings and ceiling lighting. Information and calculator results on the site are estimates only — the final price is confirmed after on-site measurement.
Inquiries submitted through the website do not create a binding contract. A contract is concluded separately, once the terms have been agreed.
We make reasonable efforts to keep website information accurate, but cannot guarantee it is error-free. We are not liable for indirect damage arising from use of the site.
All site content, design, logos and photos belong to Kodu ja Lagi. Use without permission is prohibited.
We reserve the right to change these terms at any time. Changes take effect when published on the site.
